ru: server/trust-core.cjs — proofs, limits, KeyPackages, groups, epochs, Welcome, replay и audit.
server/trust-routes.cjs — API v4, scope и route limiting.
server/e2ee-attachments.cjs — opaque ciphertext lifecycle.
client/src/crypto/* — MLS engine, recovery, device management и encrypted store.
scripts/check-release-consistency.cjs — SemVer consistency gate.
en: server/trust-core.cjs — proofs, limits, KeyPackages, groups, epochs, Welcome, replay and audit.
server/trust-routes.cjs — API v4, scope and route limiting.
server/e2ee-attachments.cjs — opaque ciphertext lifecycle.
client/src/crypto/* — MLS engine, recovery, device management and encrypted store.
scripts/check-release-consistency.cjs — SemVer consistency gate.

description.ru: Команды, architecture discipline и безопасный change workflow.
description.en: Commands, architecture discipline and a safe change workflow.

blocks.value:
npm ci
npm run dev
npm run check
npm run test:unit
npm run test:performance
npm run audit:security

ru: Сохраняйте существующие services/models/components; не создавайте duplicate implementations.
Client отвечает за UI/local state; Server — за auth, roles, validation, business rules и realtime access.
Исправляйте root cause и добавляйте regression test до/вместе с correction.
Не добавляйте TODO, mocks, empty catch, dead code или secrets.
Schema changes требуют migration, fixtures, rollback/restore path и documentation.
en: Reuse existing services/models/components; do not create duplicate implementations.
The Client owns UI/local state; the Server owns auth, roles, validation, business rules and realtime access.
Fix the root cause and add a regression test before/with the correction.
Do not add TODOs, mocks, empty catches, dead code or secrets.
Schema changes require migration, fixtures, a rollback/restore path and documentation.

description.ru: Unit, API, integration, performance, security, soak, Android и release checks.
description.en: Unit, API, integration, performance, security, soak, Android and release checks.

rows.ru: Syntax, builder config, production web build
rows.en: Syntax, builder config, production web build

ru: Owner/moderator/member permission boundaries и direct API bypass.
Ownership transfer, remove/ban/unban, invites last-use race, join requests и room policies.
Valid/invalid uploads, MIME spoofing, secure attachment scope и reuse rejection.
Trust proofs, limits, replay, Welcome/missed-commit recovery и revoke disconnect.
Offline outbox/idempotency, backup/restore, updater assets и Pulse reconciliation.
en: Owner/moderator/member permission boundaries and direct API bypass.
Ownership transfer, remove/ban/unban, invite last-use race, join requests and room policies.
Valid/invalid uploads, MIME spoofing, secure attachment scope and reuse rejection.
Trust proofs, limits, replay, Welcome/missed-commit recovery and revoke disconnect.
Offline outbox/idempotency, backup/restore, updater assets and Pulse reconciliation.

description.ru: Issue/PR workflow, review expectations и Definition of Done.
description.en: Issue/PR workflow, review expectations and Definition of Done.

ru: Изучите PROJECT_INDEX, архитектуру, security model, tests и conventions затрагиваемого domain.
Сформулируйте current behaviour, expected behaviour и security/data implications.
Создайте focused branch и failing regression test для bug fix.
Реализуйте минимальное архитектурно согласованное изменение.
Запустите relevant gates и обновите docs/changelog в том же PR.
В PR опишите root cause, changed files, migrations/API/security/tests/results и remaining limitations.
en: Study PROJECT_INDEX, architecture, security model, tests and conventions for the affected domain.
State current behaviour, expected behaviour and security/data implications.
Create a focused branch and a failing regression test for a bug fix.
Implement the smallest architecture-consistent change.
Run relevant gates and update docs/changelog in the same PR.
In the PR describe root cause, changed files, migrations/API/security/tests/results and remaining limitations.

text.ru: Client/Server contracts согласованы, server-side permissions/validation работают, migrations и errors обработаны, tests/build/lint/types зелёные, нет stubs, документация и changelog актуальны.
text.en: Client/Server contracts are aligned, server-side permissions/validation work, migrations and errors are handled, tests/build/lint/types are green, no stubs remain, and documentation/changelog are current.
